# Copilot Instructions

> **Single source of truth:** see [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) in the repo root.
>
> `AGENTS.md` holds all project conventions (architecture, testing rules, i18n workflow, CI/CD, pre-push checklist, gotchas). Copilot picks up this file automatically; the canonical content lives in `AGENTS.md` so every agent shares the same instructions.
>
> Topic-specific pitfalls and recipes live under [`docs/gotchas/`](../docs/gotchas/) and are linked from `AGENTS.md`.
